whatsapp.title: Clinic WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Link the phone number used for automatic reminders.
whatsapp.disabled: WhatsApp gateway is not enabled on the server. Contact support.
whatsapp.disconnect_description: Automatic reminders will stop until you connect a number again.

whatsapp.test_phone_hint: Include country code or a 9-digit Peruvian mobile number.
whatsapp.test_default_message: Hi, this is a test message from VetSaaS. Your clinic can send WhatsApp reminders.

whatsapp.qr_ready: Ready! You can send reminders now.
